title: symphyotrichum foliaceum var. parryi
intro: Symphyotrichum foliaceum var. parryi, also known as Parry's aster, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The leaves and flowers of Parry's aster have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, terpenes, and other bioactive compounds, which offer potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Parry's aster can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat skin issues, respiratory problems, and other health conditions.
